_doc: Foundations Jumpstart (J25, 2024-11-15) — bespoke recipe from the official 'Collecting Foundations' article (magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/collecting-foundations). Foundations Jumpstart is sold ONLY as Jumpstart Boosters, so `authoritative` offers just the Jumpstart pack. Each 20-card pack is two themed half-decks: per the article, 1–2 rare/mythic (33% chance of a second), 1 of 51 anime-style art cards, plus lands. Approximations: the exact common/uncommon/land split per theme varies and isn't published, so a representative split is used; the anime art card is modelled with a showcase filter.

jumpstart.tagline: 20 cards · two themed half-decks · 1–2 rares + an anime art card · shuffle together and play
